// FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : MYNORES SDN BHD // LIMESTONE LUMPS & CHIPS, 12,000 MT // LUMUT - TUTICORIN // LAYCAN : 20 - 25 JAN\'26
Good Day !
KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK
//
Please see carefully above all the points and send your offer on or
before 8
th
January’2026 positively
.
Please find below table of our desired terms which is to include in FN and send your offer accordingly :-
ACCT : MYNORES SDN BHD
1.
Capacity of Vessel required
12000 MT
2.
Laycan
20 – 25 January, 2026
3.
Cargo
Limestone Lumps and Chips
4.
Size of Cargo
Lumps: 6”x9” and Chips : 30 mm – 80 mm
5.
Load Port
Lumut, Malaysia
6.
Dischrage Port
Tuticorin Port, India
7.
Loading Rate
4000 MT/day
8.
Unloading Rate
3000 MT/day
9.
Demurrage Rate/day
……….. with reversible laytime at bends
10.
Dispatch Rate/day
……….. with reversible laytime at bends
11.
Freight payment
Within 3 working days after receipt of Invoice
12.
Laytime to commence
12 hrs after NOR is tendered at both ends
13.
Laytime to end
after completion of loading / unloading
14.
Release of Cargo
Against LOI of Receiver’s letter head
15.
Ocean freight/MT
………………..
16.
Agent at Ports
As per Charterers option agent at Load Port and Discharge port.
17.
Fixture Note
FN will be signed between you and our Malaysian company-Mynores Sdn Bhd
18.
COMM.
NILL ADCOMM + 1.25% BROKERAGE TO OCEAN REAPER MARITIME
Please also note the following :-
1) Vessel should be approved by respective ports.
2) Vessel should be registered at Lumut port before 7 days of arrival..
3) Offered vessel should follow the rules and regulation of Lumut port.
//
